scoring_scale.label: Explicitly Harmful
scoring_scale.definition: Terms explicitly grant broad rights to the vendor or materially restrict customer rights.

scoring_scale.label: Vague or Discretionary
scoring_scale.definition: Terms are ambiguous, discretionary, or silent on key protections.

scoring_scale.label: Partial Commitments
scoring_scale.definition: Some protections exist but contain significant gaps or exceptions.

scoring_scale.label: Best-in-Class
scoring_scale.definition: Opt-in, auditable, and minimally permissive protections.

dimensions.name: Data Ownership & Control
dimensions.description: Ownership and control of inputs, outputs, and derived data.
dimensions.key_question: Who owns and controls data submitted to and generated by the AI system?

indicators.description: User retains ownership of prompts and inputs.
User retains ownership of outputs and generated content.
Vendor license to user data is narrowly scoped and purpose-limited.
Vendor does not claim ownership of derivative works.
Data rights survive contract termination.
User can export their data in a usable format.

dimensions.name: Training & Model Improvement Usage
dimensions.description: Use of customer data for training or improving AI models.
dimensions.key_question: Is customer data used to train, fine-tune, or improve models?

indicators.description: Prompts are excluded from training by default.
Explicit opt-in is required for training usage.
Outputs are excluded from training unless opted in.
Telemetry and feedback usage is clearly defined.
Third-party model training use is disclosed.
Anonymization is explicitly defined, not implied.

dimensions.name: Data Retention, Deletion & Residency
dimensions.description: Retention duration, deletion guarantees, and geographic controls.
dimensions.key_question: How long is data retained and where is it processed?

indicators.description: Retention periods are explicitly stated.
Deletion timelines are contractually guaranteed.
Backup and log retention is disclosed.
Data residency regions are specified.
Customer can request early deletion.

dimensions.name: Security Controls & Safeguards
dimensions.key_question: What security controls are contractually committed?

indicators.description: Encryption at rest is explicitly stated.
Encryption in transit is explicitly stated.
Tenant data is logically isolated.
Security incident response obligations are defined.
Alignment with recognized security standards is stated.

dimensions.name: Privacy Protections & PII Handling
dimensions.description: Handling of personal and sensitive data.
dimensions.key_question: How is personal data protected and governed?

indicators.description: PII and sensitive data are explicitly defined.
Data minimization principles are stated.
Re-identification is contractually prohibited.
Controller vs processor roles are clarified.
Regulatory alignment (e.g., GDPR, CCPA) is stated.

dimensions.name: Third-Party & Sub-Processor Risk
dimensions.description: Risk introduced by third parties and subprocessors.
dimensions.key_question: Who else can access customer data?

indicators.description: Sub-processors are named or listed.
Advance notice of sub-processor changes is required.
Cross-border transfers are disclosed.
Vendor remains liable for sub-processors.

dimensions.name: Legal Accountability & Liability
dimensions.description: Allocation of legal risk and responsibility.
dimensions.key_question: Who bears responsibility when harm occurs?

indicators.description: IP infringement indemnification is provided.
Privacy and security indemnification is provided.
Liability caps are reasonable and defined.
Warranty disclaimers are limited in scope.

dimensions.name: Transparency & Auditability
dimensions.description: Ability to verify claims and monitor changes.
dimensions.key_question: Can the customer audit and track changes?

indicators.description: Audit rights or third-party audit reports are provided.
Material policy changes require advance notice.
Model or system changes are disclosed.
Document versioning and change history are available.
